SignalSrc.Name: FS_CAN1.L_SC_GND_BAT
SignalSrc.Description: 0: makes short circuit to GND; 1: make short circuit to BAT

SignalSrc.Name: FS_CAN1.H_SC_GND_BAT
SignalSrc.Description: 0: makes short circuit to GND; 1: make short circuit to BAT

SignalSrc.Name: FS_CAN1.SC_H_L
SignalSrc.Description: 1: make short circuit between H and L line of the CAN channel

SignalSrc.Name: FS_CAN2.L_SC_GND_BAT
SignalSrc.Description: 0: makes short circuit to GND; 1: make short circuit to BAT

SignalSrc.Name: FS_CAN2.H_SC_GND_BAT
SignalSrc.Description: 0: makes short circuit to GND; 1: make short circuit to BAT

SignalSrc.Name: FS_CAN2.SC_H_L
SignalSrc.Description: 1: make short circuit between H and L line of the CAN channel

SignalSrc.Name: DIMMING
SignalSrc.Description: Connects Dimming to the Variable resistance 4K
